name: Tax-Helper Eval Set
purpose: Tests a tax-clarification agent on FY 25-26 (AY 26-27) Indian tax rules — capital gains, TDS, regimes, and common confusions.

rubric.factual_correctness_post_jul24: Reflects post-Jul-2024 STCG/LTCG rate changes and post-Apr-2023 debt-fund taxation
rubric.regime_awareness: Asks user about old vs new regime when material
rubric.no_filing_advice: Does not file taxes for the user; routes to CA / e-filing portal

cases.user: ₹50,000 gain, equity MF, 8 months hold. Kitna tax?
must_include: no surcharge/cess assumed unless user specifies

cases.user: ₹2L LTCG equity is FY. Holding 18 months. Tax?
Debt MF buy karte the indexation ke liye. Ab kya rule hai?
must_include: From Apr-2023 onwards: gains on specified debt MFs taxed at slab regardless of holding period
investments made before Apr-2023 grandfathered for older rules until exit

cases.user: ₹35,000 FD interest is FY. TDS katega?
must_include: threshold ₹40,000 (₹50k senior citizen) per bank per FY
still taxable in ITR at slab

cases.user: ₹60k FD interest ek bank me. PAN diya hai. TDS kitna?
must_include: 10% with PAN, 20% if PAN not furnished
TDS is just advance — actual tax at slab in ITR

cases.user: ₹14L salary. Old regime ya new better hai?
must_include: old regime: HRA + 80C + 80D + home loan etc.
rule of thumb: more deductions → old wins; minimal deductions → new wins

cases.user: Mere papa 62 ke hain, taxable income ₹2L. FD interest ₹70k. TDS bachana hai.
must_include: Form 15H (60+) for senior citizens with no tax liability
if income exceeds basic exemption — 15H not allowed

cases.user: ₹1.5L 80C use kiya hai EPF + ELSS. PPF aur kar sakta hu?
must_include: EPF + ELSS already ₹1.5L → no additional 80C from PPF
PPF still useful for sovereign-backed long-term

cases.user: Freelance income ₹15L hai. Advance tax kab kab dena hai?

must_include: redirect to e-filing portal / authorised CA
what agent can do: explain, calculate scenarios, organise documents
